name: Pork with Vegetables and Cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into 3/4-inch cubes.
2. Slice onion and separate into rings.
3. Mix pork, onion, and soy sauce in a 3-quart casserole dish.
4. Cover and microwave on medium (50%) until meat is no longer pink, stirring every 3 minutes for 12 to 15 minutes.
5. Stir in salt, pepper, peas, and mushrooms; cover and microwave on medium (50%) for 9 minutes, stirring every 3 minutes.
6. Blend cornstarch with water; stir into the meat mixture. Stir in pimiento.
7. Cover and microwave on medium (50%) until meat is tender, stirring every 3 minutes for 9 to 12 minutes.
8. Stir in cashews. Let stand 5 minutes before serving, if desired, over rice.
